Hero.name: DIEGO NAVARRO
Hero.description_1: Specializing in the intersection of systemic design and high-performance software architecture. I build digital solutions where technical precision and scalability are the priority.
Hero.description_2: From automating complex processes to developing high-fidelity interfaces, focused on optimizing the product life cycle through quality engineering.

About.label: [01 — ABOUT]
About.heading: ABOUT
About.subtitle: Architecture through Automation
About.bio_1: Experience isn't measured just in years, but in the efficiency of the systems built. After managing the delivery of 150+ platforms, my focus evolved from manual execution to technical facilitation.
About.bio_2: Development of AutoQA: an automated auditing framework designed to ensure Core Web Vitals, SEO, and accessibility standards in large-scale deployments. Along with building custom scrapers for normalization and mass data migration.
About.bio_3: Specializing in Fullstack development, integrating modern architectures with Next.js and AI-powered workflows to solve complex business problems.

Services.label: [03 — CAPABILITIES]
Services.heading: SERVICES
Services.description: Product engineering and systems architecture applied to content ecosystems and automation.

Works.label: [02 — PROJECTS]
Works.heading: SELECTED PROJECTS
Works.description: Selected projects representing technical architecture and execution.

BlogSection.label: Thoughts & Articles
BlogSection.heading: BLOG
BlogSection.description: Exploring the intersection of technology, design, and digital strategy.

Vision.label: [05 — PRINCIPLES]
Vision.heading: WORK PRINCIPLES
Vision.description: Production deployment is the primary metric. Optimization for maintainability, performance, and system reliability.
Vision.tab1_content: Production deployment is the primary metric. Optimization for maintainability, performance, and system reliability. Code is developed considering long-term maintenance and team collaboration as core requirements.
Vision.tab2_content: Interface implementation requires solid architectural foundations. Components, APIs, and workflows designed as integrated systems, ensuring scalability from initial release through product growth.
Vision.tab3_content: Process optimization through CI/CD, automated testing, and design-to-code pipelines. Focusing on programmatic solutions allows for a systematic increase in operational efficiency.

Marquee.text_1: SOLUTIONS ARCHITECT • DESIGN ENGINEERING • SYSTEMS AUTOMATION •
Marquee.text_2: REACT • TYPESCRIPT • WORDPRESS • DOCKER • ARCH LINUX •

AboutPage.title: ABOUT
AboutPage.subtitle: Professional Profile
AboutPage.description: Design Engineer & Full-Stack Developer specializing in development process optimization and scalable systems architecture.
AboutPage.approach_p1: Combination of modern frontend engineering with solid infrastructure management. My approach ranges from micro-optimization of interface components to the robustness of systems architecture.
AboutPage.approach_p2: Eight years of experience delivering digital solutions. Specialization in custom architectures and automation systems that increase operational efficiency.
